PreToolUse.matcher: tool == "Bash" && tool_input.command matches "(./gradlew bootRun|docker compose up(?!.*-d))"

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo '[Hook] BLOCKED: Long-running server must run in background' >&2
echo '[Hook] Use: ./gradlew bootRun &  OR  docker compose up -d' >&2
exit 1

#!/bin/bash
input=$(cat)
file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""')
if [ -n "$file_path" ] && [ -f "$file_path" ]; then
  println=$(grep -n 'println(' "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$println" ]; then
    echo "[Hook] WARNING: println() found in $file_path" >&2
    echo "$println" | head -5 >&2
    echo "[Hook] Use proper logging instead of println" >&2
  fi
fi
